meta_description: Create a laboratory website with test catalog, online booking, and pricing. Professional design without programmers. Promto — free.

og_description: Professional medical laboratory website: test catalog, prices, online booking, and results. Create without code on Promto.
hero_title: Laboratory Website — Test Catalog and Online Booking

advantages.title: Test Catalog
advantages.description: Structured catalog with search by test name, turnaround time, and prices — convenient for patients.

advantages.title: Turnaround Times
advantages.description: Patients see when results will be ready — fewer calls to the laboratory.

advantages.title: Online Sample Collection Booking
advantages.description: Convenient booking for blood draw and other biomaterial collection without queuing.

advantages.title: Licenses and Accreditation
advantages.description: Publish documents confirming quality and regulatory compliance.

advantages.title: Quick Launch
advantages.description: Laboratory website ready in 5 minutes without programmers and designers.

advantages.title: Search Visibility
advantages.description: SEO optimization of the site for searching lab tests in your city.

how_it_works.title: Describe the Laboratory
how_it_works.description: Specify test types, collection point addresses, and operating hours — AI will create the structure.

how_it_works.title: Add Catalog and Prices
how_it_works.description: Fill in the list of tests with prices and turnaround times through a convenient editor.

how_it_works.title: Launch and Accept Bookings
how_it_works.description: Publish the site — patients will find you in search and book online.

faq.question: How do I display the test catalog on the site?
faq.answer: In the editor, add a catalog block, enter test names, prices, and turnaround times.

faq.question: Can I specify multiple collection points?
faq.answer: Yes, add all collection point addresses with a map and operating hours for each.

faq.question: How do I give patients access to test results?
faq.answer: On paid plans, you can connect a patient personal account with online results.

faq.question: Does the site support search by tests?
faq.answer: Yes, built-in search allows patients to quickly find the needed test in the catalog.

faq.question: How much does a laboratory website cost?
faq.answer: Basic website created free. Personal account, integrations, and custom domain on paid plans.

faq.question: Is a technical specialist needed for site support?
faq.answer: No. All updates are made through a simple editor without programming knowledge.

cta_mid_subtitle: Patients will find your tests in search and book without calling.
cta_final_subtitle: Create a laboratory website for free — catalog, prices, and online booking.
